title: Monetary policy decisions
summary: This source is the ECB's Bulgarian-language navigation/index page for monetary policy decisions, not an actual policy decision document. It contains links to monetary policy strategy, tools, asset purchase programs, and references a press conference dated March 19, 2026, but does not contain the actual decision content, rate statements, or policy guidance.
key_points: Page is a navigation hub listing ECB monetary policy sections (strategy, tools, asset purchase programs, press conferences)
References a monetary policy press conference dated March 19, 2026
Contains links to TLTRO operations, APP programs, emergency pandemic purchase program (PEPP)
No actual rate decision, statement text, or forward guidance is present in this source
Source is a structural index page, not a policy document
why_it_matters: This page serves as an entry point to ECB monetary policy information but contains no actionable policy content. Researchers seeking ECB rate decisions or policy statements should navigate to specific decision pages or press releases rather than this index.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/index page (source_type correctly identified as 'navigation_page')
No actual rate decision, statement text, or policy guidance is present in this source
Page contains only links to monetary policy sections, no substantive decision content
Published_at is unknown; page references March 19, 2026 press conference but does not contain that decision
Published_at is more than 90 days before TODAY but has no archival value as this is a container page
event_type set to 'unknown' which is correct given the source has no policy event content

notes: The page is a structural index listing ECB monetary policy resources. It references the most recent press conference as March 19, 2026, but does not contain the actual decision content. This source should not be archived as a policy decision; instead, the specific decision page (e.g., the March 2026 ECB rate decision press release) should be used.
